boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: subrecipient payment before milestone acceptance. Boundary: invoice memo cannot release payment without accepted milestone.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records fail to close boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: milestone acceptance and subrecipient active status both current

final_answer: Source control record SRC-26E27DC5A57B-CTL shows missing milestone acceptance and unresolved subrecipient status. Payment before acceptance violates exact boundary. Execution prohibited until current records confirm closure. Invoice memo alone insufficient per policy.
